breaking_news_suggestions.headline: Dome's 'Live Monitoring' Catches Up to Reality: 4 Live-Fetch WINs, Not 6
breaking_news_suggestions.summary: Code analysis of monitor.py (commit 8e4bf9b) confirms only 4 WINs fetch live external data. WIN-005 and WIN-027 previously listed as live-fetch are actually hardcoded. The Schumann domain literally reads: predicted=7.83, observed=7.83, pass=True. Our SEC-2b.1 has been updated with direct code quotes.
breaking_news_suggestions.why_newsworthy: Corrects and strengthens our core monitoring illusion argument with primary source code evidence
